---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

(One paragraph)

## Why

(What problem does it solve? Who benefits?)

## How you imagine it working

(Sketch the UX. Buttons, output, etc.)

## Alternatives you considered

(Other ways to solve the same problem and why they are worse)

## Are you willing to PR it?

(Yes/No/Maybe. We are happy to mentor on first PRs.)
